name: open-science-skills
description: Claude Code skills for experimental social science and computational text analysis: conjoint design, diagnostics, and data cleaning, survey design, list experiments, cross-national design, topic modeling, LLM text classification, VLM-based OCR pipelines, post-OCR cleanup, paper pre-submission review, hypothesis building, narrative building, pre-registration, and methods reporting. Invoke as /skill-name or let Claude auto-trigger based on context.
